name: Whole Wheat and Herb Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flours, baking powder, baking soda and salt into a large bowl.
2. Cut in shortening until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Stir in sage, thyme, oregano, dill weed and parsley.
4. Combine buttermilk and honey in a small bowl and mix well.
5. Add to dry ingredients and stir gently with a fork until a medium soft dough is formed.
6. Turn dough out onto lightly floured surface and divide into 4 pieces.
7. Pat each piece into a round the size of a squash top.
